creator: petef@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Committed, thanks!  A few nits: 

- please submit a unified diff in the future 
- making two tabs after all the variable names is bogus 
- MAINTAINER should just be your email, not your name 

Usually I wouldn't go to the trouble of even dealing with this (mainly because 
it wasn't a unified diff), but this port seems pretty cool :-)
